titleStmt.title: SII 9.451: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 451. (A.R. No. 377 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP BY THE SIDE OF THE EAST VERANDAH IN THE PRAKARA OF THE KOTESVARA TEMPLE AT KOTESVARA, A SUBURB OF COONDAPUR, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka [1]36[9], Prabhava, Vaiśākha, śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1447 April 30 Sunday (not verifiable), in the reign of Dēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Ruppaṇṇa-Oḍeya who was governing the Bārakūra-rājya made a grant of the village, Karuvakunda, yielding 208(1/2) honnus per annum, in order to conduct some charities instituted by Gururāya-Oḍeya, in the name of the king, for the service of the god Kōṭināthadēva and for feeding ten Brāhmans every day. This income is stated to have been transferred from the accounts of Government revenue to the temple revenue.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē nama[ḥ .*] namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra
kyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudaya 1369 neya
varttamāna prabhavasaṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 15 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvī
rapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyara nirūpadiṁ bārakūra ruppaṁṇaOḍeyaru śrīkōṭinātha
dēvarige koṭṭa dharmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare dēvarāyamahārāyara hesara dharmavāgi bhaṁḍā
rada gururāyaOḍeyaru śrīkōṭināthadēvarige daruśanake baṁdalli māḍida dharmmada vivara tiṁga
ḷoṁdakke raṁgapūje Oṁdakkaṁ koṭa ga 5 lekkadalu tiṁgaḷu 12 kaṁ raṁgapūje 12 kkaṁ ga 60 pra
tivaruṣadalū bhādrapada ba 5 tithiyalū māḍuva mahāpūjege kā ga 30 nityāstitiyalu guru
rāyaOḍeyaru māḍisida maṭhadalu naḍeva chatra Ayidu pari śāka toye tuppa viḷeya sahita Aṭṭuva
brāhmaṇa 1 Uṁba brāhmara jana 10 kaṁ kāṭi ga 100 raṁgapūje mahāpūjege parimaḷada hūmālege
Antu ga 196 . Akṣaradalu nūṟatoṁbhattaĀṟūvare hoṁnu prabhavasaṁvatsarada vaiśākha śu 15 pu(ṁ)
ṇyakāladalū dēvarāyamahārāyara hesaralū kōṭināthadēvara sannidhiyalu dhāreya
neṟadarāgi yī dhar(ṁ)mmake bārakūranāḷuva ruppaṁṇaOḍeyaru viṁgaḍisikoṭṭa grāma karuvakuṁ
da grāma 1 � ga 25 ¥ 1 yī dharṁmakke narauḍuga 16 Au
madrikeya yetti salisuva manuṣyage ga 12 U bhaṁ ga 208 . Akṣāradalū
yiṁnūṟayeṁṭūvare ho(ṁ)nnanu bārakūra cāvaḍiya vahige tegesi �yo dharmake dhāreya
neṟadu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi biḍu dēvasvavāgi sarvvamānyavāgi koṭṭevāgi sukhadiṁ
bhōgisūdu yī dharmavanu �yo stānadalu kālāṭigaḷāda dhaṁnyaru karuvakuṁda mūvattu
vrittikāṟara kaiyalu Ā grāmada kuḷa Upacāra hālu habba Ēnuḷaṁthādanu naḍasi ba
hadu �yo dharmava tappade naḍasisi pālisi baharu �yo sthāna mānyavanu Ēkasvāmyadalū pālisi
sarvvamānyavāgi naḍavaṁtha �yo dharmaśāsanakke karaṇika liṁgarasa virūpākṣadēvagaḷu Oḍeyara Oppa
Oppa śubhamastu �yo dharmakke Ārobbaru Aḷupidavaru kōṭi
kavileya vadhisida pāpakke hōharu
vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*] dānapāla
nayōrmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ
Digital edition of SII 9.451 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
